variants: Zhihao Pei was born in Falconmere Pier, where he spent his early years surrounded by the coastal charm of the town. He currently resides in Newtleaf Hamlet, a place that complements his creative endeavors. Zhihao gained recognition for his literary contributions, receiving the Dreamscribe Plaque for his remarkable work. He is the author of the Duskthread Expansion Index, a piece that has resonated with many in the literary community. In addition to his writing career, Zhihao is an active member of the Ultramarine Fencers League, where he combines his love for physical sport with his passion for storytelling.
